contents.userPrompt:
You are an expert Haskell and Bash programmer specialized in writing clean, idiomatic, and efficient Haskell code.
When writing Bash code:
- Avoid bash-specific logic but bash-ism are fine.
- Document required shell tools at the top of the bash script.
When writing Haskell code:
- Use modern Haskell practices (base >= 4.14)
- Prefer pure functions and explicit type signatures
- Use standard libraries when appropriate
- Add clear comments for complex logic
- Follow consistent formatting
Use list-files to explore the project structure, read-file to understand existing code, write-file to create or modify files, and check-code to verify your work.
Always compile code before considering the job done.
Your output format may be stored as commit message: hence the first line of your last message should be a summary line.
You have access to a tool which is a copy of yourself named io_prompt_agent_oneshot, use it when a task is well-scoped in a way that it would save tokens in your context window and not interfere with your work.

content.content:
1100	                    action <- liftIO $ analyzeContent content
1101	                    case action of
1102	                        IgnoreContent ->
1103	                            showStatus StatusWarning "No attachable content in clipboard"
1104	                        PasteAsText text -> do
1105	                            editorContents <- use (tuiUI . messageEditor . editContentsL)
1106	                            let newContents = TextZipper.insertMany text editorContents
1107	                            tuiUI . messageEditor . editContentsL .= newContents
1108	                            showStatus StatusInfo "Text pasted from clipboard"
1109	                        AttachAsMedia attachment -> do
1110	                            mConv <- getFocusedConversation
1111	                            case mConv of
1112	                                Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
1113	                                Just conv -> do
1114	                                    let convId = conversationId conv
1115	                                    tuiUI . attachedFiles %= Map.insertWith (\new old -> old ++ new) convId [attachment]
1116	                                    let filename = maybe "unnamed" id attachment.mediaFilename
1117	                                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Attached from clipboard: " <> filename
1118	                        AttachMultipleFiles attachments -> do
1119	                            mConv <- getFocusedConversation
1120	                            case mConv of
1121	                                Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
1122	                                Just conv -> do
1123	                                    let convId = conversationId conv
1124	                                    tuiUI . attachedFiles %= Map.insertWith (\new old -> old ++ new) convId attachments
1125	                                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Attached " <> Text.pack (show $ length attachments) <> " files from clipboard"
1126	
1127	-- | Open the attachment dialog.
1128	handleOpenAttachmentDialog :: EventM N TuiState ()
1129	handleOpenAttachmentDialog = do
1130	    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
1131	    case mConv of
1132	        Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
1133	        Just _ -> do
1134	            tuiUI . attachmentDialogState .= AttachmentDialogPathInput
1135	            -- Set focus to file path input
1136	            tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusSetCurrent FilePathInputWidget
1137	
1138	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1139	-- Status Message Helpers
1140	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1141	
1142	-- | Show a status message in the TUI.
1143	showStatus :: StatusSeverity -> Text.Text -> EventM N TuiState ()
1144	showStatus severity text = do
1145	    chan <- use eventChan
1146	    liftIO $ writeBChan chan (AppEvent_ShowStatus severity text)
1147	
1148	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1149	-- Markdown Export Handlers
1150	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1151	
1152	-- | Get the currently focused session, if any.
1153	getFocusedSession :: EventM N TuiState (Maybe Session)
1154	getFocusedSession = do
1155	    mConv <- use (tuiUI . conversationList . to listSelectedElement)
1156	    case mConv of
1157	        Just (_, conv) -> do
1158	            -- First try to get the session from the conversation's cached session
1159	            case conversationSession conv of
1160	                Just sess -> pure (Just sess)
1161	                Nothing -> do
1162	                    -- If not cached, try to read from session store
1163	                    config <- use sessionConfig
1164	                    liftIO $ SessionStore.readSession config.sessionStore (conversationId conv)
1165	        Nothing -> do
1166	            -- Try session list
1167	            mSession <- use (tuiUI . sessionList . to listSelectedElement)
1168	            pure $ fmap snd mSession
1169	
1170	-- | Get the currently focused conversation, if any.
1171	getFocusedConversation :: EventM N TuiState (Maybe Conversation)
1172	getFocusedConversation = do
1173	    mConv <- use (tuiUI . conversationList . to listSelectedElement)
1174	    pure $ fmap snd mConv
1175	
1176	-- | Get the conversation ID of the currently focused conversation.
1177	getFocusedConversationId :: EventM N TuiState (Maybe ConversationId)
1178	getFocusedConversationId = do
1179	    mConv <- use (tuiUI . conversationList . to listSelectedElement)
1180	    pure $ fmap (conversationId . snd) mConv
1181	
1182	-- | Format a session as markdown with the specified order preference.
1183	formatSessionMarkdown :: OrderPreference -> Session -> Text.Text
1184	formatSessionMarkdown orderPref session =
1185	    let opts =
1186	            SessionPrintOptions
1187	                { sessionPrintFile = "" -- Not used for in-memory formatting
1188	                , showToolCallResults = ShownFull
1189	                , showToolCallArguments = ShownFull
1190	                , nTurns = Nothing
1191	                , repeatSystemPrompt = False
1192	                , repeatTools = False
1193	                , orderPreference = orderPref
1194	                , noFunnyStamp = True -- Skip ASCII art in TUI exports for cleaner output
1195	                }
1196	     in formatSessionAsMarkdown opts session
1197	
1198	{- | Handle Ctrl+m: Dump the currently focused session to a markdown file.
1199	The file is named `<conversation-id>.md`.
1200	-}
1201	handleDumpSessionToMarkdown :: EventM N TuiState ()
1202	handleDumpSessionToMarkdown = do
1203	    mSession <- getFocusedSession
1204	    mConvId <- getFocusedConversationId
1205	    case (mSession, mConvId) of
1206	        (Just session, Just (ConversationId cid)) -> do
1207	            let markdown = formatSessionMarkdown Chronological session
1208	                fileName = "conv." <> show cid <.> "md"
1209	            liftIO $ TextIO.writeFile fileName markdown
1210	            showStatus StatusInfo $ "Exported to " <> Text.pack fileName
1211	        (Just session, Nothing) -> do
1212	            let markdown = formatSessionMarkdown Chronological session
1213	                fileName = "sess." <> show session.sessionId <.> "md"
1214	            liftIO $ TextIO.writeFile fileName markdown
1215	            showStatus StatusInfo $ "Exported to " <> Text.pack fileName
1216	        _ -> do
1217	            showStatus StatusWarning "No session or conversation selected"
1218	
1219	{- | Handle Ctrl+t or Ctrl+r: Display the currently focused session with an external viewer.
1220	Uses the AGENT_MD_VIEWER environment variable if set.
1221	The viewer is executed asynchronously and tracked as an auxiliary task.
1222	
1223	Ctrl+t uses Chronological order (oldest first).
1224	Ctrl+r uses Antichronological order (newest first).
1225	-}
1226	handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer :: OrderPreference -> EventM N TuiState ()
1227	handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer orderPref = do
1228	    mViewer <- liftIO $ lookupEnv "AGENT_MD_VIEWER"
1229	    case mViewer of
1230	        Just viewerCmd -> do
1231	            mSession <- getFocusedSession
1232	            mConvId <- getFocusedConversationId
1233	            case (mSession, mConvId) of
1234	                (Just session, Just convId) -> do
1235	                    let markdown = formatSessionMarkdown orderPref session
1236	                    -- Create a temporary file with the markdown content
1237	                    tempFile <- liftIO $ writeSystemTempFile "session-view-" (Text.unpack markdown)
1238	                    -- Spawn the viewer process asynchronously
1239	                    viewerAsync <- liftIO $ async $ do
1240	                        result <- readProcessWithExitCode viewerCmd [tempFile] ""
1241	                        case result of
1242	                            (ExitFailure code, _, err) ->
1243	                                hPutStrLn stderr $ "AGENT_MD_VIEWER failed with exit code " ++ show code ++ ": " ++ err
1244	                            _ -> pure ()
1245	                    -- Track the async task
1246	                    let task = Viewer viewerAsync convId session.sessionId
1247	                    tuiUI . auxiliaryTasks %= (task :)
1248	                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Opening with " <> Text.pack viewerCmd
1249	                (Just _, Nothing) -> do
1250	                    showStatus StatusWarning "No conversation selected"
1251	                (Nothing, _) -> do
1252	                    showStatus StatusWarning "No session selected"
1253	        Nothing -> do
1254	            showStatus StatusWarning "AGENT_MD_VIEWER not set"
1255	
1256	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1257	-- Focus Management
1258	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1259	
1260	{- | Get the corresponding Tab for a WidgetName.
1261	Returns Nothing if the widget doesn't have an associated tab.
1262	-}
1263	widgetToTab :: WidgetName -> Maybe Tab
1264	widgetToTab AgentListWidget = Just AgentsTab
1265	widgetToTab ConversationListWidget = Just ChatsTab
1266	widgetToTab SessionsListWidget = Just HistoryTab
1267	widgetToTab _ = Nothing
1268	
1269	{- | Update the current tab based on the focused widget.
1270	When the focus changes to a widget associated with a different tab,
1271	this function updates both the tab and the focus ring to match.
1272	-}
1273	updateTabFromFocus :: EventM N TuiState ()
1274	updateTabFromFocus = do
1275	    mFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
1276	    case mFocus >>= widgetToTab of
1277	        Just tab -> do
1278	            currentTab' <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
1279	            -- Only update if the tab is actually changing
1280	            when (tab /= currentTab') $ do
1281	                tuiUI . currentTab .= tab
1282	                -- Rebuild focus ring for the new tab, preserving current focus
1283	                mCurrentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
1284	                tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= buildFocusRingForTabPreserving tab mCurrentFocus
1285	        Nothing -> pure ()
1286	
1287	{- | Cycle focus forward through widgets.
1288	After cycling, updates the active tab based on the new focus.
1289	-}
1290	cycleFocusForward :: EventM N TuiState ()
1291	cycleFocusForward = do
1292	    tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusNext
1293	    tuiUI . zoomed .= False
1294	    -- Also update the active tab based on the new focus
1295	    updateTabFromFocus
1296	
1297	{- | Cycle focus backward through widgets.
1298	After cycling, updates the active tab based on the new focus.
1299	-}
1300	cycleFocusBackward :: EventM N TuiState ()

content.content:
700	        AppEvent (AppEvent_ShowStatus severity text) ->
701	            handleShowStatus severity text
702	        AppEvent AppEvent_ClearStatus ->
703	            handleClearStatus
704	        -- Tab switching
705	        -- Note: Ctrl+[ sends KEsc in Vty (ASCII 27), not KChar '[' with MCtrl
706	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEsc [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
707	            resetQuitConfirmation
708	            cycleTabBackward
709	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar ']') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
710	            resetQuitConfirmation
711	            cycleTabForward
712	        -- VTY events
713	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'q') [Vty.MCtrl]) ->
714	            handleQuit
715	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar '\t') _) -> do
716	            resetQuitConfirmation
717	            cycleFocusForward
718	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KBackTab _) -> do
719	            resetQuitConfirmation
720	            cycleFocusBackward
721	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KFun 5) _) -> do
722	            resetQuitConfirmation
723	            handleRefreshTools
724	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'z') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
725	            resetQuitConfirmation
726	            toggleZoom
727	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'n') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
728	            resetQuitConfirmation
729	            handleNewConversationFromEditor tracer
730	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'c') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
731	            resetQuitConfirmation
732	            handleRestoredConversation tracer
733	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter [Vty.MMeta]) -> do
734	            resetQuitConfirmation
735	            handleSendMessage
736	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'e') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
737	            resetQuitConfirmation
738	            handleTogglePauseConversation
739	        -- Attachment handling
740	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'f') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
741	            resetQuitConfirmation
742	            openFilePathDialog
743	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'F') [Vty.MCtrl, Vty.MShift]) -> do
744	            resetQuitConfirmation
745	            handleClearAllAttachments
746	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'v') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
747	            resetQuitConfirmation
748	            handleClipboardPaste tracer
749	        -- Session export
750	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'p') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
751	            resetQuitConfirmation
752	            handleDumpSessionToMarkdown
753	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 't') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
754	            resetQuitConfirmation
755	            handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer Chronological
756	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'r') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
757	            resetQuitConfirmation
758	            handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer Antichronological
759	        -- Queue management: Ctrl+D to clear all queued messages
760	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'd') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
761	            resetQuitConfirmation
762	            handleClearQueuedMessages
763	        -- Delegate to focused widget
764	        VtyEvent vtyEv -> do
765	            resetQuitConfirmation
766	            currentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
767	            case currentFocus of
768	                Just AgentListWidget ->
769	                    handleAgentListEvent vtyEv
770	                Just SessionsListWidget ->
771	                    handleSessionsListEvent vtyEv
772	                Just ConversationListWidget ->
773	                    handleConversationListEvent vtyEv
774	                Just MessageEditorWidget ->
775	                    handleMessageEditorEvent ev
776	                Just ConversationViewWidget ->
777	                    handleConversationViewEvent tracer vtyEv
778	                Just SessionViewWidget ->
779	                    handleSessionViewEvent tracer vtyEv
780	                Just AgentInfoWidget ->
781	                    handleAgentInfoEvent vtyEv
782	                Just QueuedMessageListWidget ->
783	                    handleQueuedMessageListEvent vtyEv
784	                Just AttachmentListWidget ->
785	                    handleAttachmentListEvent vtyEv
786	                _ ->
787	                    pure ()
788	        _ -> pure ()
789	
790	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
791	-- Widget-Specific Event Handlers
792	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
793	
794	-- | Handle agent list navigation.
795	handleAgentListEvent :: Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
796	handleAgentListEvent ev = do
797	    zoom (tuiUI . agentList) $ handleListEvent ev
798	    -- Update selected agent info when selection changes
799	    selected <- use (tuiUI . agentList . to listSelectedElement)
800	    case selected of
801	        Just (_, agent) -> do
802	            tuiUI . selectedAgentInfo .= Just agent
803	            -- Refresh tools for the newly selected agent
804	            refreshToolsForAgent agent
805	        Nothing -> pure ()
806	
807	-- | Handle conversation list navigation.
808	handleConversationListEvent :: Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
809	handleConversationListEvent ev =
810	    case ev of
811	        -- Enter key opens the selected conversation (switches to Chats tab and focuses message)
812	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter [] -> do
813	            mSelected <- use (tuiUI . conversationList . to listSelectedElement)
814	            case mSelected of
815	                Just (_, conv) -> do
816	                    -- Switch to Chats tab and focus message editor
817	                    switchToChatsAndFocusMessage
818	                    -- Mark conversation as read
819	                    tuiUI . unreadConversations %= Set.delete (conversationId conv)
820	                Nothing -> pure ()
821	        -- Normal navigation
822	        _ -> do
823	            zoom (tuiUI . conversationList) $ handleListEvent ev
824	            -- Mark conversation as read when selected
825	            selected <- use (tuiUI . conversationList . to listSelectedElement)
826	            case selected of
827	                Just (_, conv) ->
828	                    tuiUI . unreadConversations %= Set.delete (conversationId conv)
829	                Nothing -> pure ()
830	
831	-- | Handle sessions list navigation.
832	handleSessionsListEvent :: Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
833	handleSessionsListEvent ev = do
834	    zoom (tuiUI . sessionList) $ handleListEvent ev
835	
836	-- | Handle message editor events.
837	handleMessageEditorEvent :: BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
838	handleMessageEditorEvent ev = do
839	    zoom (tuiUI . messageEditor) $ handleEditorEvent ev
840	    -- Check for special key combinations
841	    case ev of
842	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter mods)
843	            | Vty.MCtrl `elem` mods -> handleSendMessage
844	        _ -> pure ()
845	
846	-- | Handle conversation view scrolling and queue management.
847	handleConversationViewEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
848	handleConversationViewEvent _tracer ev = do
849	    -- Check if we have a paused conversation with queued messages
850	    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
851	    hasQueuedMessages <- case mConv of
852	        Just conv -> do
853	            buffered <- use (tuiUI . uiBufferedMessages)
854	            pure $ case Map.lookup (conversationId conv) buffered of
855	                Just msgs | conversationStatus conv == ConversationStatus_Paused -> not (null msgs)
856	                _ -> False
857	        Nothing -> pure False
858	
859	    case ev of
860	        -- Enter key enters turn navigation mode
861	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter [] -> do
862	            mSession <- getFocusedSession
863	            case mSession of
864	                Just session | not (null session.turns) -> do
865	                    let navState =
866	                            TurnNavigationState
867	                                { _navSession = session
868	                                , _navSelectedTurnIndex = length session.turns - 1 -- Start at most recent
869	                                , _navTotalTurns = length session.turns
870	                                }
871	                    tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just navState
872	                    showStatus StatusInfo "Navigation mode: Up/Down to navigate, F to fork, Enter/Esc to exit"
873	                _ ->
874	                    showStatus StatusWarning "No session or empty session to navigate"
875	        -- Queue management: Up arrow for navigation (only when paused with queued messages)
876	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp [] | hasQueuedMessages -> do
877	            handleQueueNavigation (-1)
878	        -- Queue management: Down arrow for navigation (only when paused with queued messages)
879	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown [] | hasQueuedMessages -> do
880	            handleQueueNavigation 1
881	        -- Queue management: Delete key to delete selected message
882	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDel [] | hasQueuedMessages -> do
883	            handleDeleteSelectedMessage
884	        -- Queue management: Backspace key to delete selected message
885	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KBS [] | hasQueuedMessages -> do
886	            handleDeleteSelectedMessage
887	        -- Normal scrolling (when not in queue management mode)
888	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp _ ->
889	            vScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) (-1)
890	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown _ ->
891	            vScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) 1
892	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KLeft _ ->
893	            hScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) (-1)
894	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KRight _ ->
895	            hScrollBy (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) 1
896	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageUp _ ->
897	            vScrollPage (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) Up
898	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KPageDown _ ->
899	            vScrollPage (viewportScroll ConversationViewWidget) Down
900	        _ -> pure ()

550	    case parseMediaReference input of
551	        Left err -> pure $ Left err
552	        Right mediaRef -> do
553	            -- Resolve the MIME type
554	            case resolveMediaType mediaRef of
555	                Left err -> pure $ Left err
556	                Right mimeType -> do
557	                    -- Try to read the file
558	                    let filePath = case Text.breakOn ";" (Text.pack input) of
559	                            (_, "") -> input
560	                            (_, rest) -> Text.unpack $ Text.drop 1 rest
561	                    fileContent <- ByteString.readFile filePath
562	                    let base64Data = TextEncoding.decodeUtf8 $ Base64.encode fileContent
563	                    let filename = Just $ Text.pack $ takeFileName filePath
564	                    pure $ Right $ MediaAttachment mimeType base64Data filename

566	-- | Close the file path dialog (legacy) and reset input.
567	closeFilePathDialog :: EventM N TuiState ()
568	closeFilePathDialog = do
569	    tuiUI . attachmentDialogState .= AttachmentDialogClosed
570	    tuiUI . filePathInput . editContentsL .= TextZipper.textZipper [] Nothing
571	
572	-- | Open the file path dialog (legacy) - kept for potential future use.
573	openFilePathDialogLegacy :: EventM N TuiState ()
574	openFilePathDialogLegacy = do
575	    tuiUI . attachmentDialogState .= AttachmentDialogPathInput
576	    -- Pre-fill with a helpful example
577	    tuiUI . filePathInput . editContentsL .= TextZipper.textZipper ["/path/to/file.png"] (Just 1)
578	
579	-- | Open the file browser dialog (replaces legacy text input).
580	openFilePathDialog :: EventM N TuiState ()
581	openFilePathDialog = do
582	    openFileBrowserDialog
583	
584	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
585	-- Turn Navigation Event Handler
586	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
587	
588	-- | Handle events when in turn navigation mode.
589	handleTurnNavigationEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> TurnNavigationState -> BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
590	handleTurnNavigationEvent tracer navState ev =
591	    case ev of
592	        -- Application events pass through
593	        AppEvent AppEvent_Heartbeat ->
594	            handleHeartbeat
595	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress convId sess) ->
596	            handleConversationUpdated convId sess
597	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput convId) ->
598	            handleConversationNeedsInput convId
599	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentTrace _) ->
600	            pure ()
601	        AppEvent (AppEvent_ShowStatus severity text) ->
602	            handleShowStatus severity text
603	        AppEvent AppEvent_ClearStatus ->
604	            handleClearStatus
605	        -- Exit navigation mode with Enter
606	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter []) -> do
607	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Nothing
608	            showStatus StatusInfo "Exited turn navigation"
609	            resetQuitConfirmation
610	
611	        -- Also allow Esc to exit
612	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEsc []) -> do
613	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Nothing
614	            showStatus StatusInfo "Exited turn navigation"
615	            resetQuitConfirmation
616	
617	        -- Navigate up (to earlier turns)
618	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp []) -> do
619	            let currentIdx = navState ^. navSelectedTurnIndex
620	                newIdx = max 0 (currentIdx - 1)
621	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just (navState{_navSelectedTurnIndex = newIdx})
622	
623	        -- Navigate down (to later turns)
624	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown []) -> do
625	            let currentIdx = navState ^. navSelectedTurnIndex
626	                maxIdx = (navState ^. navTotalTurns) - 1
627	                newIdx = min maxIdx (currentIdx + 1)
628	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just (navState{_navSelectedTurnIndex = newIdx})
629	
630	        -- Fork at current turn
631	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'f') []) -> do
632	            handleForkAtTurn tracer navState
633	
634	        -- Fork at current turn (uppercase F)
635	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'F') []) -> do
636	            handleForkAtTurn tracer navState
637	
638	        -- Ignore other events in navigation mode
639	        _ -> pure ()
640	
641	-- | Fork a new conversation at the selected turn.
642	handleForkAtTurn :: Tracer IO Trace -> TurnNavigationState -> EventM N TuiState ()
643	handleForkAtTurn tracer navState = do
644	    let session = navState ^. navSession
645	        selectedIdx = navState ^. navSelectedTurnIndex
646	        originalSessionId = session.sessionId
647	
648	    -- Create forked session with dropping unwanted turns
649	    let turnsToKeep = drop selectedIdx session.turns
650	
651	    -- Generate new session ID and turn ID
652	    newSessionId' <- liftIO newSessionId
653	    newTurnId' <- liftIO newTurnId
654	
655	    let forkedSession =
656	            Session
657	                { turns = turnsToKeep
658	                , sessionId = newSessionId'
659	                , forkedFromSessionId = Just originalSessionId
660	                , turnId = newTurnId'
661	                , sessionVersion = Just 1 -- Media support enabled
662	                }
663	
664	    -- Create a new conversation with this session
665	    mAgent <- use (tuiUI . agentList . to listSelectedElement)
666	    case mAgent of
667	        Just (_, baseTuiAgent) -> do
668	            -- Start conversation with forked session
669	            runConversation tracer baseTuiAgent forkedSession
670	
671	            -- Show status
672	            showStatus StatusInfo $
673	                "Forked at turn "
674	                    <> Text.pack (show selectedIdx)
675	                    <> " - New conversation @"
676	                    <> tuiSlug baseTuiAgent
677	
678	            -- Exit navigation mode
679	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Nothing
680	        Nothing ->
681	            showStatus StatusError "No agent selected for forked conversation"
682	
683	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
684	-- Normal Event Handler
685	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
686	
687	-- | Handle normal (non-navigation) events.
688	handleNormalEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
689	handleNormalEvent tracer ev = do
690	    case ev of
691	        -- Application events
692	        AppEvent AppEvent_Heartbeat ->
693	            handleHeartbeat
694	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress convId sess) ->
695	            handleConversationUpdated convId sess
696	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput convId) ->
697	            handleConversationNeedsInput convId
698	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentTrace _) ->
699	            pure () -- todo: handle traces made by the app
700	        AppEvent (AppEvent_ShowStatus severity text) ->

You are an expert Haskell and Bash programmer specialized in writing clean, idiomatic, and efficient Haskell code.

100	    currentTab,
101	    eventChan,
102	    fileBrowser,
103	    filePathInput,
104	    messageEditor,
105	    navSelectedTurnIndex,
106	    navSession,
107	    navTotalTurns,
108	    ongoingConversations,
109	    queuedMessagesFocus,
110	    quitConfirmationPending,
111	    selectedAgentInfo,
112	    selectedAttachmentIndex,
113	    sessionConfig,
114	    sessionList,
115	    statusMessage,
116	    tuiAgentId,
117	    tuiCore,
118	    tuiNode,
119	    tuiSlug,
120	    tuiTree,
121	    tuiUI,
122	    turnNavigation,
123	    uiBufferedMessages,
124	    uiFocusRing,
125	    unreadConversations,
126	    updateConversationSession,
127	    zoomed,
128	 )
129	
130	-- Import Tracer for creating a no-op tracer
131	import Prod.Tracer (Tracer (..), contramap)
132	
133	data Trace
134	    = RuntimeTrace !Runtime.Trace
135	    | OneShotTrace !OneShot.Trace
136	    deriving (Show)
137	
138	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
139	-- Help Content
140	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
141	
142	-- | Default keyboard shortcuts help content.
143	defaultHelpContent :: [Text.Text]
144	defaultHelpContent =
145	    [ "Keyboard Shortcuts:"
146	    , ""
147	    , "Navigation:"
148	    , "  Tab          - Cycle focus forward through widgets"
149	    , "  Shift+Tab    - Cycle focus backward through widgets"
150	    , "  Ctrl+Z       - Toggle zoom mode (based on current tab)"
151	    , ""
152	    , "Zoom Mode (Ctrl+Z):"
153	    , "  Agents  tab  - Zooms the agent description panel"
154	    , "  Chats   tab  - Zooms the conversation panel"
155	    , "  History tab  - Zooms the session panel"
156	    , "  Help    tab  - Zooms the help content"
157	    , ""
158	    , "Tabs:"
159	    , "  Ctrl+[       - Switch to previous tab"
160	    , "  Ctrl+]       - Switch to next tab"
161	    , "  Enter        - Open selected conversation (from Conversations list)"
162	    , ""
163	    , "Conversations:"
164	    , "  Ctrl+N       - Start new conversation with selected agent"
165	    , "  Ctrl+C       - Continue restored session"
166	    , "  Meta+Enter   - Send message"
167	    , "  Ctrl+E       - Pause/unpause conversation"
168	    , ""
169	    , "Attachments:"
170	    , "  Ctrl+F       - Attach file (opens file browser)"
171	    , "  Ctrl+Shift+F - Clear all attachments"
172	    , "  Ctrl+V       - Paste from clipboard (images/files)"
173	    , "  Del/Backspace- Remove selected attachment"
174	    , "  Up/Down      - Select attachment"
175	    , ""
176	    , "Queue Management (when paused):"
177	    , "  Ctrl+D       - Clear all queued messages"
178	    , "  Del/Backspace- Delete selected queued message"
179	    , "  Up/Down      - Select queued message"
180	    , ""
181	    , "Session Navigation & Forking:"
182	    , "  Enter        - Enter turn navigation mode (when on conversation)"
183	    , "  Up/Down      - Navigate between turns (in navigation mode)"
184	    , "  F            - Fork conversation at selected turn"
185	    , "  Enter/Esc    - Exit turn navigation mode"
186	    , ""
187	    , "Session Export:"
188	    , "  Ctrl+P       - Export session to markdown file"
189	    , "  Ctrl+T       - View session in external viewer (chronological)"
190	    , "  Ctrl+R       - View session in external viewer (reverse)"
191	    , ""
192	    , "Other:"
193	    , "  F5           - Refresh tools for selected agent"
194	    , "  Ctrl+Q       - Quit application (press twice to confirm)"
195	    ]
196	
197	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
198	-- Focus Ring Management
199	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
200	
201	{- | The base widgets that are always present in the focus ring.
202	These correspond to the main navigation lists.
203	-}
204	baseFocusWidgets :: [WidgetName]
205	baseFocusWidgets = [AgentListWidget, ConversationListWidget, SessionsListWidget]
206	
207	{- | Build a focus ring for a given tab.
208	The ring includes base widgets plus tab-specific widgets inserted appropriately.
209	The focus ring order is designed so that pressing Tab from a base widget
210	will first visit the tab-specific widget(s) before moving to the next base widget.
211	-}
212	buildFocusRingForTab :: Tab -> FocusRing WidgetName
213	buildFocusRingForTab tab =
214	    -- Order: base widget, then its tab-specific widget(s), then next base widget, etc.
215	    case tab of
216	        AgentsTab ->
217	            focusRing [AgentListWidget, AgentInfoWidget, ConversationListWidget, SessionsListWidget]
218	        ChatsTab ->
219	            focusRing [ConversationListWidget, MessageEditorWidget, AttachmentListWidget, QueuedMessageListWidget, ConversationViewWidget, SessionsListWidget, AgentListWidget]
220	        HistoryTab ->
221	            -- SessionsListWidget -> AgentInfoWidget -> AgentListWidget -> ConversationListWidget
222	            focusRing [SessionsListWidget, SessionViewWidget, AgentListWidget, ConversationListWidget]
223	        HelpTab ->
224	            -- Just base widgets in default order
225	            focusRing baseFocusWidgets
226	
227	{- | Get the default (entry) widget for a tab.
228	This is the widget that should receive focus when switching to this tab.
229	-}
230	tabEntryWidget :: Tab -> WidgetName
231	tabEntryWidget AgentsTab = AgentListWidget
232	tabEntryWidget ChatsTab = ConversationListWidget
233	tabEntryWidget HistoryTab = SessionsListWidget
234	tabEntryWidget HelpTab = AgentListWidget -- Default to agent list for help
235	
236	{- | Build a focus ring for a tab, attempting to preserve the current focus if valid.
237	If the current focus is not in the new tab's focus ring, falls back to the tab's entry widget.
238	-}
239	buildFocusRingForTabPreserving :: Tab -> Maybe WidgetName -> FocusRing WidgetName
240	buildFocusRingForTabPreserving tab mCurrentFocus =
241	    let newRing = buildFocusRingForTab tab
242	        -- Check if current focus is valid in the new ring
243	        validFocus = case mCurrentFocus of
244	            Just wf | wf `elem` focusRingElements newRing -> Just wf
245	            _ -> Nothing
246	        -- Start with either the preserved focus or the tab's entry widget
247	        startFocus = case validFocus of
248	            Just wf -> wf
249	            Nothing -> tabEntryWidget tab
250	     in focusSetCurrent startFocus newRing
251	
252	-- | Get all elements in a focus ring.
253	focusRingElements :: FocusRing WidgetName -> [WidgetName]
254	focusRingElements fr =
255	    -- FocusRing is a circular structure, we extract elements by iterating
256	    go (focusSetCurrent (tabEntryWidget AgentsTab) fr) []
257	  where
258	    go ring acc =
259	        case focusGetCurrent ring of
260	            Just w | w `elem` acc -> reverse acc -- Completed a cycle
261	            Just w -> go (focusNext ring) (w : acc)
262	            Nothing -> reverse acc
263	
264	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
265	-- Tab Cycling Functions
266	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
267	
268	-- | Get the next tab in the cycle.
269	nextTab :: Tab -> Tab
270	nextTab AgentsTab = ChatsTab
271	nextTab ChatsTab = HistoryTab
272	nextTab HistoryTab = HelpTab
273	nextTab HelpTab = AgentsTab
274	
275	-- | Get the previous tab in the cycle.
276	prevTab :: Tab -> Tab
277	prevTab AgentsTab = HelpTab
278	prevTab ChatsTab = AgentsTab
279	prevTab HistoryTab = ChatsTab
280	prevTab HelpTab = HistoryTab
281	
282	{- | Cycle to the next tab forward.
283	Also updates the focus ring to match the new tab's widgets.
284	-}
285	cycleTabForward :: EventM N TuiState ()
286	cycleTabForward = do
287	    current <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
288	    let next = nextTab current
289	    tuiUI . currentTab .= next
290	    -- Update focus ring for the new tab
291	    mCurrentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
292	    tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= buildFocusRingForTabPreserving next mCurrentFocus
293	
294	{- | Cycle to the previous tab backward.
295	Also updates the focus ring to match the new tab's widgets.
296	-}
297	cycleTabBackward :: EventM N TuiState ()
298	cycleTabBackward = do
299	    current <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
300	    let prev = prevTab current

{"filepath": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedRecordDot #-}
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}

{- | Event handling for the TUI application.

This module handles all user input and application events for the TUI.
During migration to the OS model, tool operations use the RuntimeBridge
which synchronizes tools between the legacy Runtime and OS Core.

This module now includes support for subcall visibility:
- SubcallStarted events create new subcall conversations in the TUI
- SubcallProgress events update subcall conversation sessions
- SubcallCompleted events update subcall status and notify the user
- SubcallFailed events update subcall status and show error messages
-}
module System.Agents.TUI.Event where

import Brick
import Brick.BChan (BChan, newBChan, readBChan, writeBChan)
import Brick.Focus (FocusRing, focusGetCurrent, focusNext, focusPrev, focusRing, focusSetCurrent)
import Brick.Widgets.Edit (editContentsL, getEditContents, handleEditorEvent)
import Brick.Widgets.FileBrowser (
    fileBrowserCursor,
    fileInfoFilePath,
    handleFileBrowserEvent,
    newFileBrowser,
    selectNonDirectories,
 )
import Brick.Widgets.List (handleListEvent, listElements, listInsert, listSelectedElement, listSelectedL)
import qualified Brick.Widgets.List as List
import Control.Concurrent (forkIO, threadDelay)
import Control.Concurrent.Async (async, poll)
import Control.Concurrent.STM (STM, TVar, atomically, modifyTVar, readTVar, readTVarIO, writeTVar)
import Control.Lens (to, use, (%=), (.=), (^.), _Just)
import Control.Monad (filterM, void, when)
import Control.Monad.IO.Class (liftIO)
import Data.Char (toLower)
import Data.Map.Strict (Map)
import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import qualified Data.Set as Set
import qualified Data.Text as Text
import qualified Data.Text.IO as TextIO
import qualified Data.Text.Zipper as TextZipper
import Data.Time (diffUTCTime, getCurrentTime)
import qualified Data.Vector as Vector
import qualified Graphics.Vty as Vty
import System.Environment (lookupEnv)
import System.Exit (ExitCode (..))
import System.FilePath (takeExtension, takeFileName, (<.>))
import System.IO (hPutStrLn, stderr)
import System.IO.Temp (writeSystemTempFile)
import System.Process (readProcessWithExitCode)

import qualified Data.ByteString as ByteString
import qualified Data.ByteString.Base64 as Base64
import qualified Data.Text.Encoding as TextEncoding

import System.Agents.AgentTree (OSAgentNode (..), osNodeTools)
import System.Agents.Base (AgentId (..), ConversationId (..), newConversationId)
import System.Agents.CLI.PromptScript (parseMediaReference, resolveMediaType)
import System.Agents.Combinators.ProgressiveDisclosure (agentEvaluateActiveTools)
import System.Agents.Media.Types (MediaAttachment (..))
import System.Agents.OneShot (mapProgressiveDisclosureTrace, nodeToAgent)
import qualified System.Agents.OneShot as OneShot
import qualified System.Agents.Runtime.Trace as Runtime
import System.Agents.Session.Base (Action (..), Agent (..), MissingUserPrompt (..), OnSessionProgress, Session (..), SessionProgress (..), UserQuery (..), newSessionId, newTurnId)
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Loop as Loop
import System.Agents.SessionPrint (OrderPreference (..), PrintVisibility (..), SessionPrintOptions (..), formatSessionAsMarkdown)
import qualified System.Agents.SessionStore as SessionStore
import System.Agents.TUI.Clipboard (
    ContentAction (..),
    analyzeContent,
    detectClipboardContent,
    hasClipboardSupport,
 )
import System.Agents.TUI.Types (
    AppEvent (..),
    AttachmentDialogState (..),
    AuxiliaryTask (..),
    Conversation (..),
    ConversationStatus (..),
    Core (..),
    N,
    SessionConfig (..),
    StatusMessage (..),
    StatusSeverity (..),
    Tab (..),
    TuiAgent (..),
    TuiState,
    TurnNavigationState (..),
    UIState (..),
    WidgetName (..),
    agentList,
    attachedFiles,
    attachmentDialogState,
    auxiliaryTasks,
    conversationId,
    conversationList,
    conversationName,
    conversationSession,
    conversationStatus,
    coreAgentTools,
    coreBufferedMessages,
    coreConversations,
    corePausedConversations,
    currentTab,
    eventChan,
    fileBrowser,
    filePathInput,
    messageEditor,
    navSelectedTurnIndex,
    navSession,
    navTotalTurns,
    ongoingConversations,
    queuedMessagesFocus,
    quitConfirmationPending,
    selectedAgentInfo,
    selectedAttachmentIndex,
    sessionConfig,
    sessionList,
    statusMessage,
    tuiAgentId,
    tuiCore,
    tuiNode,
    tuiSlug,
    tuiTree,
    tuiUI,
    turnNavigation,
    uiBufferedMessages,
    uiFocusRing,
    unreadConversations,
    updateConversationSession,
    zoomed,
    mkSubcallConversation,
 )

-- Import Tracer for creating a no-op tracer
import Prod.Tracer (Tracer (..), contramap)

data Trace
    = RuntimeTrace !Runtime.Trace
    | OneShotTrace !OneShot.Trace
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Help Content
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Default keyboard shortcuts help content.
defaultHelpContent :: [Text.Text]
defaultHelpContent =
    [ "Keyboard Shortcuts:"
    , ""
    , "Navigation:"
    , "  Tab          - Cycle focus forward through widgets"
    , "  Shift+Tab    - Cycle focus backward through widgets"
    , "  Ctrl+Z       - Toggle zoom mode (based on current tab)"
    , ""
    , "Zoom Mode (Ctrl+Z):"
    , "  Agents  tab  - Zooms the agent description panel"
    , "  Chats   tab  - Zooms the conversation panel"
    , "  History tab  - Zooms the session panel"
    , "  Help    tab  - Zooms the help content"
    , ""
    , "Tabs:"
    , "  Ctrl+[       - Switch to previous tab"
    , "  Ctrl+]       - Switch to next tab"
    , "  Enter        - Open selected conversation (from Conversations list)"
    , ""
    , "Conversations:"
    , "  Ctrl+N       - Start new conversation with selected agent"
    , "  Ctrl+C       - Continue restored session"
    , "  Meta+Enter   - Send message"
    , "  Ctrl+E       - Pause/unpause conversation"
    , ""
    , "Subcall Visibility:"
    , "  Subcalls appear with '↳' prefix in conversation list"
    , "  Subcalls show parent/child relationships automatically"
    , "  Subcall progress is tracked in real-time"
    , ""
    , "Attachments:"
    , "  Ctrl+F       - Attach file (opens file browser)"
    , "  Ctrl+Shift+F - Clear all attachments"
    , "  Ctrl+V       - Paste from clipboard (images/files)"
    , "  Del/Backspace- Remove selected attachment"
    , "  Up/Down      - Select attachment"
    , ""
    , "Queue Management (when paused):"
    , "  Ctrl+D       - Clear all queued messages"
    , "  Del/Backspace- Delete selected queued message"
    , "  Up/Down      - Select queued message"
    , ""
    , "Session Navigation & Forking:"
    , "  Enter        - Enter turn navigation mode (when on conversation)"
    , "  Up/Down      - Navigate between turns (in navigation mode)"
    , "  F            - Fork conversation at selected turn"
    , "  Enter/Esc    - Exit turn navigation mode"
    , ""
    , "Session Export:"
    , "  Ctrl+P       - Export session to markdown file"
    , "  Ctrl+T       - View session in external viewer (chronological)"
    , "  Ctrl+R       - View session in external viewer (reverse)"
    , ""
    , "Other:"
    , "  F5           - Refresh tools for selected agent"
    , "  Ctrl+Q       - Quit application (press twice to confirm)"
    ]

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Focus Ring Management
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | The base widgets that are always present in the focus ring.
These correspond to the main navigation lists.
-}
baseFocusWidgets :: [WidgetName]
baseFocusWidgets = [AgentListWidget, ConversationListWidget, SessionsListWidget]

{- | Build a focus ring for a given tab.
The ring includes base widgets plus tab-specific widgets inserted appropriately.
The focus ring order is designed so that pressing Tab from a base widget
will first visit the tab-specific widget(s) before moving to the next base widget.
-}
buildFocusRingForTab :: Tab -> FocusRing WidgetName
buildFocusRingForTab tab =
    -- Order: base widget, then its tab-specific widget(s), then next base widget, etc.
    case tab of
        AgentsTab ->
            focusRing [AgentListWidget, AgentInfoWidget, ConversationListWidget, SessionsListWidget]
        ChatsTab ->
            focusRing [ConversationListWidget, MessageEditorWidget, AttachmentListWidget, QueuedMessageListWidget, ConversationViewWidget, SessionsListWidget, AgentListWidget]
        HistoryTab ->
            -- SessionsListWidget -> AgentInfoWidget -> AgentListWidget -> ConversationListWidget
            focusRing [SessionsListWidget, SessionViewWidget, AgentListWidget, ConversationListWidget]
        HelpTab ->
            -- Just base widgets in default order
            focusRing baseFocusWidgets

{- | Get the default (entry) widget for a tab.
This is the widget that should receive focus when switching to this tab.
-}
tabEntryWidget :: Tab -> WidgetName
tabEntryWidget AgentsTab = AgentListWidget
tabEntryWidget ChatsTab = ConversationListWidget
tabEntryWidget HistoryTab = SessionsListWidget
tabEntryWidget HelpTab = AgentListWidget -- Default to agent list for help

{- | Build a focus ring for a tab, attempting to preserve the current focus if valid.
If the current focus is not in the new tab's focus ring, falls back to the tab's entry widget.
-}
buildFocusRingForTabPreserving :: Tab -> Maybe WidgetName -> FocusRing WidgetName
buildFocusRingForTabPreserving tab mCurrentFocus =
    let newRing = buildFocusRingForTab tab
        -- Check if current focus is valid in the new ring
        validFocus = case mCurrentFocus of
            Just wf | wf `elem` focusRingElements newRing -> Just wf
            _ -> Nothing
        -- Start with either the preserved focus or the tab's entry widget
        startFocus = case validFocus of
            Just wf -> wf
            Nothing -> tabEntryWidget tab
     in focusSetCurrent startFocus newRing

-- | Get all elements in a focus ring.
focusRingElements :: FocusRing WidgetName -> [WidgetName]
focusRingElements fr =
    -- FocusRing is a circular structure, we extract elements by iterating
    go (focusSetCurrent (tabEntryWidget AgentsTab) fr) []
  where
    go ring acc =
        case focusGetCurrent ring of
            Just w | w `elem` acc -> reverse acc -- Completed a cycle
            Just w -> go (focusNext ring) (w : acc)
            Nothing -> reverse acc

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Tab Cycling Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Get the next tab in the cycle.
nextTab :: Tab -> Tab
nextTab AgentsTab = ChatsTab
nextTab ChatsTab = HistoryTab
nextTab HistoryTab = HelpTab
nextTab HelpTab = AgentsTab

-- | Get the previous tab in the cycle.
prevTab :: Tab -> Tab
prevTab AgentsTab = HelpTab
prevTab ChatsTab = AgentsTab
prevTab HistoryTab = ChatsTab
prevTab HelpTab = HistoryTab

{- | Cycle to the next tab forward.
Also updates the focus ring to match the new tab's widgets.
-}
cycleTabForward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleTabForward = do
    current <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    let next = nextTab current
    tuiUI . currentTab .= next
    -- Update focus ring for the new tab
    mCurrentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= buildFocusRingForTabPreserving next mCurrentFocus

{- | Cycle to the previous tab backward.
Also updates the focus ring to match the new tab's widgets.
-}
cycleTabBackward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleTabBackward = do
    current <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    let prev = prevTab current
    tuiUI . currentTab .= prev
    -- Update focus ring for the new tab
    mCurrentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= buildFocusRingForTabPreserving prev mCurrentFocus

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Navigation Helpers
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Switch to the Chats tab and focus the message editor.
This is used when starting or opening a conversation.
-}
switchToChatsAndFocusMessage :: EventM N TuiState ()
switchToChatsAndFocusMessage = do
    -- Switch to Chats tab
    tuiUI . currentTab .= ChatsTab
    -- Build focus ring for ChatsTab and set focus to MessageEditorWidget
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= focusSetCurrent MessageEditorWidget (buildFocusRingForTab ChatsTab)
    -- Ensure zoom mode is off for better visibility
    tuiUI . zoomed .= False

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Quit Confirmation
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Handle Ctrl+Q with confirmation.
First press shows confirmation message, second press actually quits.
-}
handleQuit :: EventM N TuiState ()
handleQuit = do
    pending <- use (tuiUI . quitConfirmationPending)
    if pending
        then halt
        else do
            tuiUI . quitConfirmationPending .= True
            showStatus StatusWarning "Are you sure? Press Ctrl+Q again to quit"

-- | Reset quit confirmation state (call when user performs other actions).
resetQuitConfirmation :: EventM N TuiState ()
resetQuitConfirmation = do
    tuiUI . quitConfirmationPending .= False

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Main Event Handler
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Main event handler for the TUI application.
tui_appHandleEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
tui_appHandleEvent tracer ev = do
    -- Check if attachment dialog is open
    dialogState <- use (tuiUI . attachmentDialogState)
    case dialogState of
        AttachmentDialogPathInput -> handleFilePathDialogEvent ev
        AttachmentDialogFileBrowser -> handleFileBrowserDialogEvent ev
        AttachmentDialogClosed -> do
            -- Check if we're in turn navigation mode
            mNavState <- use (tuiUI . turnNavigation)
            case mNavState of
                Just navState -> handleTurnNavigationEvent tracer navState ev
                Nothing -> handleNormalEvent tracer ev

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- File Path Dialog Event Handler (Legacy)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Handle events when file path dialog is open.
handleFilePathDialogEvent :: BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleFilePathDialogEvent ev =
    case ev of
        -- Confirm with Enter
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter []) -> do
            handleConfirmFileAttachment
        -- Cancel with Esc
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEsc []) -> do
            closeFilePathDialog
            showStatus StatusInfo "Attachment cancelled"
        -- Handle typing in the editor
        VtyEvent vtyEv -> do
            zoom (tuiUI . filePathInput) $ handleEditorEvent (VtyEvent vtyEv)
        _ -> pure ()

-- | Confirm file attachment from path input.
handleConfirmFileAttachment :: EventM N TuiState ()
handleConfirmFileAttachment = do
    pathLines <- use (tuiUI . filePathInput . to getEditContents)
    let pathText = Text.strip $ Text.unlines pathLines

    if Text.null pathText
        then do
            closeFilePathDialog
            showStatus StatusWarning "No file path entered"
        else do
            -- Try to load the media attachment
            result <- liftIO $ loadMediaAttachment (Text.unpack pathText)
            case result of
                Left err -> do
                    closeFilePathDialog
                    showStatus StatusError $ Text.pack err
                Right attachment -> do
                    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
                    case mConv of
                        Nothing -> do
                            closeFilePathDialog
                            showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
                        Just conv -> do
                            let convId = conversationId conv
                            -- Add attachment to the conversation
                            tuiUI . attachedFiles %= Map.insertWith (\new old -> old ++ new) convId [attachment]
                            closeFilePathDialog
                            showStatus StatusInfo $ "Attached: " <> maybe "unnamed" id attachment.mediaFilename

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- File Browser Dialog Event Handler
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Handle events when file browser dialog is open.
handleFileBrowserDialogEvent :: BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleFileBrowserDialogEvent ev =
    case ev of
        -- Cancel with Esc
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEsc []) -> do
            closeFileBrowserDialog
            showStatus StatusInfo "Attachment cancelled"
        -- Confirm selection with Enter
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter []) -> do
            handleFileBrowserSelection
        -- Handle FileBrowser-specific events (navigation, search, etc.)
        VtyEvent vtyEv -> do
            mFb <- use (tuiUI . fileBrowser)
            case mFb of
                Nothing -> pure () -- Should not happen
                Just _ -> do
                    -- Handle file browser events (navigation, search, etc.)
                    -- Note: handleFileBrowserEvent works in EventM and modifies the browser state
                    zoom (tuiUI . fileBrowser . _Just) $ handleFileBrowserEvent vtyEv
        _ -> pure ()

-- | Handle file selection from FileBrowser.
handleFileBrowserSelection :: EventM N TuiState ()
handleFileBrowserSelection = do
    mFb <- use (tuiUI . fileBrowser)
    case mFb of
        Nothing -> do
            closeFileBrowserDialog
            showStatus StatusError "File browser not initialized"
        Just fb -> do
            -- Get selected file from cursor position
            case fileBrowserCursor fb of
                Nothing -> do
                    closeFileBrowserDialog
                    showStatus StatusWarning "No file selected"
                Just fileInfo -> do
                    let filePath = fileInfoFilePath fileInfo
                    -- Load the file as MediaAttachment
                    result <- liftIO $ loadFileAsAttachment filePath
                    case result of
                        Left err -> do
                            closeFileBrowserDialog
                            showStatus StatusError $ Text.pack err
                        Right attachment -> do
                            mConv <- getFocusedConversation
                            case mConv of
                                Nothing -> do
                                    closeFileBrowserDialog
                                    showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
                                Just conv -> do
                                    let convId = conversationId conv
                                    tuiUI . attachedFiles %= Map.insertWith (\new old -> old ++ new) convId [attachment]
                                    closeFileBrowserDialog
                                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Attached: " <> maybe "unnamed" id attachment.mediaFilename

-- | Load file as MediaAttachment.
loadFileAsAttachment :: FilePath -> IO (Either String MediaAttachment)
loadFileAsAttachment filePath = do
    -- Detect MIME type from extension
    let mimeType = detectMimeType filePath
    -- Read file content
    fileContent <- ByteString.readFile filePath
    let base64Data = TextEncoding.decodeUtf8 $ Base64.encode fileContent
    let filename = Just $ Text.pack $ takeFileName filePath
    pure $ Right $ MediaAttachment mimeType base64Data filename

-- | Simple MIME type detection from file extension.
detectMimeType :: FilePath -> Text.Text
detectMimeType fp =
    let lowerFp = map toLower fp
        ext = takeExtension lowerFp
     in case ext of
            ".png" -> "image/png"
            ".jpg" -> "image/jpeg"
            ".jpeg" -> "image/jpeg"
            ".gif" -> "image/gif"
            ".webp" -> "image/webp"
            ".svg" -> "image/svg+xml"
            ".bmp" -> "image/bmp"
            ".tiff" -> "image/tiff"
            ".mp3" -> "audio/mpeg"
            ".wav" -> "audio/wav"
            ".ogg" -> "audio/ogg"
            ".mp4" -> "video/mp4"
            ".webm" -> "video/webm"
            ".mov" -> "video/quicktime"
            ".pdf" -> "application/pdf"
            ".json" -> "application/json"
            ".xml" -> "application/xml"
            ".zip" -> "application/zip"
            ".gz" -> "application/gzip"
            ".tar" -> "application/x-tar"
            ".txt" -> "text/plain"
            ".md" -> "text/markdown"
            ".html" -> "text/html"
            ".css" -> "text/css"
            ".js" -> "text/javascript"
            ".py" -> "text/x-python"
            ".hs" -> "text/x-haskell"
            ".c" -> "text/x-c"
            ".cpp" -> "text/x-c++"
            ".rs" -> "text/x-rust"
            ".go" -> "text/x-go"
            ".sh" -> "text/x-shellscript"
            ".yaml" -> "text/yaml"
            ".yml" -> "text/yaml"
            _ -> "application/octet-stream"

-- | Close file browser dialog and cleanup.
closeFileBrowserDialog :: EventM N TuiState ()
closeFileBrowserDialog = do
    tuiUI . attachmentDialogState .= AttachmentDialogClosed
    tuiUI . fileBrowser .= Nothing

-- | Open file browser dialog.
openFileBrowserDialog :: EventM N TuiState ()
openFileBrowserDialog = do
    -- Create new file browser with "select non-directories" predicate
    -- This allows navigation into directories but only files are "selectable"
    fb <- liftIO $ newFileBrowser selectNonDirectories FilePathInputWidget Nothing
    tuiUI . fileBrowser .= Just fb
    tuiUI . attachmentDialogState .= AttachmentDialogFileBrowser

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Media Loading
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Load a media attachment from a file path.
Supports explicit MIME type via "mime/type;path" format or auto-detection.
-}
loadMediaAttachment :: FilePath -> IO (Either String MediaAttachment)
loadMediaAttachment input = do
    -- Parse the input (handles both "path" and "mime/type;path" formats)
    case parseMediaReference input of
        Left err -> pure $ Left err
        Right mediaRef -> do
            -- Resolve the MIME type
            case resolveMediaType mediaRef of
                Left err -> pure $ Left err
                Right mimeType -> do
                    -- Try to read the file
                    let filePath = case Text.breakOn ";" (Text.pack input) of
                            (_, "") -> input
                            (_, rest) -> Text.unpack $ Text.drop 1 rest
                    fileContent <- ByteString.readFile filePath
                    let base64Data = TextEncoding.decodeUtf8 $ Base64.encode fileContent
                    let filename = Just $ Text.pack $ takeFileName filePath
                    pure $ Right $ MediaAttachment mimeType base64Data filename

-- | Close the file path dialog (legacy) and reset input.
closeFilePathDialog :: EventM N TuiState ()
closeFilePathDialog = do
    tuiUI . attachmentDialogState .= AttachmentDialogClosed
    tuiUI . filePathInput . editContentsL .= TextZipper.textZipper [] Nothing

-- | Open the file path dialog (legacy) - kept for potential future use.
openFilePathDialogLegacy :: EventM N TuiState ()
openFilePathDialogLegacy = do
    tuiUI . attachmentDialogState .= AttachmentDialogPathInput
    -- Pre-fill with a helpful example
    tuiUI . filePathInput . editContentsL .= TextZipper.textZipper ["/path/to/file.png"] (Just 1)

-- | Open the file browser dialog (replaces legacy text input).
openFilePathDialog :: EventM N TuiState ()
openFilePathDialog = do
    openFileBrowserDialog

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Turn Navigation Event Handler
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Handle events when in turn navigation mode.
handleTurnNavigationEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> TurnNavigationState -> BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleTurnNavigationEvent tracer navState ev =
    case ev of
        -- Application events pass through
        AppEvent AppEvent_Heartbeat ->
            handleHeartbeat
        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress convId sess) ->
            handleConversationUpdated convId sess
        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput convId) ->
            handleConversationNeedsInput convId
        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentTrace _) ->
            pure ()
        AppEvent (AppEvent_ShowStatus severity text) ->
            handleShowStatus severity text
        AppEvent AppEvent_ClearStatus ->
            handleClearStatus
        -- Subcall events
        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallStarted parentId subcallId slug depth) ->
            handleSubcallStarted parentId subcallId slug depth
        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallProgress subcallId sess) ->
            handleSubcallProgress subcallId sess
        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallCompleted subcallId result) ->
            handleSubcallCompleted subcallId result
        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallFailed subcallId err) ->
            handleSubcallFailed subcallId err
        -- Exit navigation mode with Enter
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter []) -> do
            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Nothing
            showStatus StatusInfo "Exited turn navigation"
            resetQuitConfirmation

        -- Also allow Esc to exit
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEsc []) -> do
            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Nothing
            showStatus StatusInfo "Exited turn navigation"
            resetQuitConfirmation

        -- Navigate up (to earlier turns)
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp []) -> do
            let currentIdx = navState ^. navSelectedTurnIndex
                newIdx = max 0 (currentIdx - 1)
            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just (navState{_navSelectedTurnIndex = newIdx})

        -- Navigate down (to later turns)
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown []) -> do
            let currentIdx = navState ^. navSelectedTurnIndex
                maxIdx = (navState ^. navTotalTurns) - 1
                newIdx = min maxIdx (currentIdx + 1)
            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just (navState{_navSelectedTurnIndex = newIdx})

        -- Fork at current turn
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'f') []) -> do
            handleForkAtTurn tracer navState

        -- Fork at current turn (uppercase F)
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'F') []) -> do
            handleForkAtTurn tracer navState

        -- Ignore other events in navigation mode
        _ -> pure ()

-- | Fork a new conversation at the selected turn.
handleForkAtTurn :: Tracer IO Trace -> TurnNavigationState -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleForkAtTurn tracer navState = do
    let session = navState ^. navSession
        selectedIdx = navState ^. navSelectedTurnIndex
        originalSessionId = session.sessionId

    -- Create forked session with dropping unwanted turns
    let turnsToKeep = drop selectedIdx session.turns

    -- Generate new session ID and turn ID
    newSessionId' <- liftIO newSessionId
    newTurnId' <- liftIO newTurnId

    let forkedSession =
            Session
                { turns = turnsToKeep
                , sessionId = newSessionId'
                , forkedFromSessionId = Just originalSessionId
                , turnId = newTurnId'
                , sessionVersion = Just 1 -- Media support enabled
                }

    -- Create a new conversation with this session
    mAgent <- use (tuiUI . agentList . to listSelectedElement)
    case mAgent of
        Just (_, baseTuiAgent) -> do
            -- Start conversation with forked session
            runConversation tracer baseTuiAgent forkedSession

            -- Show status
            showStatus StatusInfo $
                "Forked at turn "
                    <> Text.pack (show selectedIdx)
                    <> " - New conversation @"
                    <> tuiSlug baseTuiAgent

            -- Exit navigation mode
            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Nothing
        Nothing ->
            showStatus StatusError "No agent selected for forked conversation"

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Normal Event Handler
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Handle normal (non-navigation) events.
handleNormalEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleNormalEvent tracer ev = do
    case ev of
        -- Application events
        AppEvent AppEvent_Heartbeat ->
            handleHeartbeat
        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress convId sess) ->
            handleConversationUpdated convId sess
        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput convId) ->
            handleConversationNeedsInput convId
        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentTrace _) ->
            pure () -- todo: handle traces made by the app
        AppEvent (AppEvent_ShowStatus severity text) ->
            handleShowStatus severity text
        AppEvent AppEvent_ClearStatus ->
            handleClearStatus
        -- Subcall events
        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallStarted parentId subcallId slug depth) ->
            handleSubcallStarted parentId subcallId slug depth
        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallProgress subcallId sess) ->
            handleSubcallProgress subcallId sess
        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallCompleted subcallId result) ->
            handleSubcallCompleted subcallId result
        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallFailed subcallId err) ->
            handleSubcallFailed subcallId err
        -- Tab switching
        -- Note: Ctrl+[ sends KEsc in Vty (ASCII 27), not KChar '[' with MCtrl
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEsc [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            cycleTabBackward
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar ']') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            cycleTabForward
        -- VTY events
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'q') [Vty.MCtrl]) ->
            handleQuit
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar '\t') _) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            cycleFocusForward
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KBackTab _) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            cycleFocusBackward
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KFun 5) _) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleRefreshTools
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'z') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            toggleZoom
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'n') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleNewConversationFromEditor tracer
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'c') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleRestoredConversation tracer
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter [Vty.MMeta]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleSendMessage
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'e') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleTogglePauseConversation
        -- Attachment handling
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'f') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            openFilePathDialog
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'F') [Vty.MCtrl, Vty.MShift]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleClearAllAttachments
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'v') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleClipboardPaste tracer
        -- Session export
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'p') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleDumpSessionToMarkdown
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 't') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer Chronological
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'r') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer Antichronological
        -- Queue management: Ctrl+D to clear all queued messages
        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'd') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            handleClearQueuedMessages
        -- Delegate to focused widget
        VtyEvent vtyEv -> do
            resetQuitConfirmation
            currentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
            case currentFocus of
                Just AgentListWidget ->
                    handleAgentListEvent vtyEv
                Just SessionsListWidget ->
                    handleSessionsListEvent vtyEv
                Just ConversationListWidget ->
                    handleConversationListEvent vtyEv
                Just MessageEditorWidget ->
                    handleMessageEditorEvent ev
                Just ConversationViewWidget ->
                    handleConversationViewEvent tracer vtyEv
                Just SessionViewWidget ->
                    handleSessionViewEvent tracer vtyEv
                Just AgentInfoWidget ->
                    handleAgentInfoEvent vtyEv
                Just QueuedMessageListWidget ->
                    handleQueuedMessageListEvent vtyEv

This module handles all user input and application events for the TUI.
During migration to the OS model, tool operations use the RuntimeBridge
which synchronizes tools between the legacy Runtime and OS Core.

This module now includes support for subcall visibility:
- SubcallStarted events create new subcall conversations in the TUI
- SubcallProgress events update subcall conversation sessions
